prompt: Please look up the meeting “Vendor renewal review” at Denver Office and tell me its record ID and current scheduled date. This is only a check for now: do not change, cancel, or notify anything. In the final recap, give the record ID first, the original scheduled date second, and the corrected scheduled date third.

follow_up_turns.content: That is the right meeting. For that same record only, set the scheduled date to 2026-11-18; keep notifications off.
Small correction: set the scheduled date to 2026-12-22, not 2026-11-18. This replaces only the value from my last message; keep the same record and do not notify anyone.

stages.purpose: Resolve one exact target by name and location while leaving nearby distractors untouched.
Apply the first requested scheduled date only to the resolved target.
Replace the superseded scheduled date on that same target with the user's correction.

response_constraints: Keep every follow-up tied to the record resolved in the preceding stage; do not switch to a similarly named record.
Do not report a lookup or update as successful unless the corresponding tool result establishes it.
After the correction, report the final scheduled date and make clear that the first requested scheduled date was superseded.
The final recap must present these items in order: record ID; original scheduled date; corrected scheduled date.
